title: Context-scoped polymorphic replacement via sum-type enum field
prompt: Design a NotificationDelivery schema that records delivery attempts for notifications sent via three channels (email, sms, push). Do NOT use Rails polymorphic fields. Do NOT use the polymorphic_embed library (pretend it's not available). Instead, use: (1) a channel field of Ecto.Enum values [:email, :sms, :push]; (2) three nullable channel-specific fields (email_address, sms_number, push_device_token); (3) a custom validator that asserts exactly one channel-specific field is set and it matches the channel. Write to lib/my_app/notifications/delivery.ex.
tier_rationale: Legendary because it requires synthesizing Ecto.Enum + cross-field validation + refusing both Rails and polymorphic_embed escape hatches. Sonnet typically falls back to one of the rejected patterns.
research_citation: Ecto Polymorphic Associations guide + Elixir Forum polymorphism discussion.
